messages.content: Hi, I'd like to book a dental appointment.
Certainly. May I have your name, please?
Thank you, Sarah. What date would you prefer for your appointment?
I'm thinking next Tuesday, maybe around 10am?
Noted. What type of dental procedure do you need for the appointment?
Thank you, Sarah. I have scheduled a routine cleaning appointment for you on next Tuesday at 10 AM. If you need to make any changes, please let us know. Have a great day!

Thank you for providing your phone number, Sarah. I have your appointment for a routine cleaning on next Tuesday at 10 AM, and your contact number is noted. If you have any questions or need to reschedule, feel free to reach out. Have a great day!
